subject: A Super Saiyan warrior with upright spiky golden hair wearing a sleeveless dark vest and light-colored pants, surrounded by electric golden aura with lightning crackling around them, posed in a ready stance.
suspected_ip: Future Trunks (Super Saiyan 2) — Dragon Ball franchise
description: A Super Saiyan fighter stands in a mid-shot composition with upright spiky golden hair characteristic of the Super Saiyan transformation. The figure wears a sleeveless dark vest over a light undershirt with light-colored pants — a costume distinct from Goku's gi, suggesting a different character. Golden electric energy crackles visibly around the figure, with small lightning arcs suggesting the Super Saiyan 2 state. The stance is upright and ready, slightly angled, with the figure's expression resolute. White and gold energy fills the background.
foreground: Super Saiyan fighter in dark sleeveless vest, crackling golden-electric aura
background: Bright white and gold energy field
emotion: Determined, resolute — justice-driven focus rather than rage
